description_long: This bird features a vibrant red head and upper chest, transitioning into a yellow back with black scalloped markings. Its wings are a mix of blue and black, with the blue extending along the lower flanks and underparts. The tail is long and slender, predominantly blue with hints of green and gray, and tapers to a fine point. The beak is short, pale, and slightly curved, typical of seed-eating birds. The legs are not clearly visible but appear to be a muted gray or pinkish tone. The overall plumage is strikingly colorful, with a distinct pattern that makes the bird highly recognizable in urban parks or gardens.
description: A colorful bird with a red head, yellow and black patterned back, blue wings, and a long blue tail. Its plumage is vibrant and intricately patterned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red head, yellow and black back, blue wings, and the full length of the blue tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the yellow and black patterned back and the straight, narrow tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the red head, yellow and black back, blue wings, and long blue tail.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the red head, pale beak, and the symmetrical pattern of the upper chest and back.
attribute_plumage_pattern: scalloped black markings on yellow back, solid red head and chest, blue wings and tail
